concept.title: Customize Cloud-Native Router Helm Chart for Bare Metal Servers

abstract.shortdesc: Read this topic to learn about the deployment configuration available for the Juniper Cloud-Native Router on bare metal servers.

conbody.p: You can deploy and operate Juniper Cloud-Native Router in the L2, L3, or L2-L3 mode on a bare metal server. You configure the deployment mode by editing the appropriate attributes in the values.yaml file prior to deployment.

li.p: In the fabricInterface key of the values.yaml file:
When all the interfaces have an interface_mode key configured, then the mode of deployment would be L2.
When one or more interfaces have an interface_mode key configured along with the rest of the interfaces not having the interface_mode key, then the mode of deployment would be L2-L3.
When none of the interfaces have the interface_mode key configured, then the mode of deployment would be L3.
